records.question: Which customers live at 108 South Polk Street in Amarillo with the zip code 79101.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customer.cust_id FROM customer
WHERE customer.zip = 79101.0 AND customer.city = 'Amarillo' AND customer.address = '108 South Polk Street'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT cust_id
FROM customer
WHERE zip = 79101.0 AND city = 'Amarillo' AND address = '108 South Polk Street'

records.question: Which customers are retailers located in the 98409.0 zip code?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customer.cust_id FROM customer
WHERE customer.zip = 98409.0 AND customer.cust_type = 'retailer'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT cust_id
FROM customer
WHERE zip = 98409.0 AND cust_type = 'retailer'

records.question: What customers have an address exactly at 4030 Northeast Buffalo Street and have made shipments?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customer.cust_id FROM customer
JOIN shipment ON customer.cust_id = shipment.cust_id
WHERE customer.address = '4030 Northeast Buffalo Street'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.cust_id
FROM customer c
INNER JOIN shipment s ON c.cust_id = s.cust_id
WHERE c.address = '4030 Northeast Buffalo Street'

records.question: Which customers with annual revenue at most 18839770 have shipments on or after 2017-06-05 using trucks made exactly by Kenworth?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customer.cust_id FROM customer
JOIN shipment ON customer.cust_id = shipment.cust_id
JOIN truck ON shipment.truck_id = truck.truck_id
WHERE truck.make = 'Kenworth' AND customer.annual_revenue <= 18839770 AND shipment.ship_date >= '2017-06-05'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.cust_id
FROM customer c
JOIN shipment s ON c.cust_id = s.cust_id
JOIN truck t ON s.truck_id = t.truck_id
WHERE c.annual_revenue <= 18839770
AND s.ship_date >= '2017-06-05'
AND t.make = 'Kenworth'

records.question: Who are the customers that had shipments on 2017-06-17?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customer.cust_id FROM customer
JOIN shipment ON customer.cust_id = shipment.cust_id
JOIN city ON shipment.city_id = city.city_id
WHERE shipment.ship_date = '2017-06-17'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT customer.cust_id
FROM customer
JOIN shipment ON customer.cust_id = shipment.cust_id
JOIN city ON shipment.city_id = city.city_id
WHERE shipment.ship_date = '2017-06-17'

records.question: Who are the customers named AAA Rentals Sales & Service with phone (714) 633-6626 and address 400 North Tustin Street, located in Washington, whose annual revenue is at most 11901075 and have shipments on or before 2017-06-24?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customer.cust_id FROM customer
JOIN shipment ON customer.cust_id = shipment.cust_id
JOIN city ON shipment.city_id = city.city_id
WHERE shipment.ship_date <= '2017-06-24' AND customer.phone = '(714) 633-6626' AND customer.address = '400 North Tustin Street' AND customer.annual_revenue <= 11901075 AND customer.cust_name = 'AAA Rentals Sales & Service' AND city.state = 'Washington'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.cust_id
FROM customer c
WHERE c.phone = '(714) 633-6626'
  AND c.address = '400 North Tustin Street'
  AND c.annual_revenue <= 11901075
  AND c.cust_name = 'AAA Rentals Sales & Service'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM shipment s
    JOIN city ci ON s.city_id = ci.city_id
    WHERE s.cust_id = c.cust_id
      AND s.ship_date <= '2017-06-24'
      AND ci.state = 'Washington'
  )

records.question: What customers are retailers located at 2701 East Luzerne Street in Philadelphia with phone number (215) 743-1000, zip 19137.0, annual revenue at most 33611123, who had shipments weighing exactly 14751.0 on or before 2017-10-03?

SELECT customer.cust_id FROM customer

WHERE c.phone = '(215) 743-1000'

    WHERE s.cust_id = c.cust_id
      AND s.ship_date <= '2017-10-03'
      AND s.weight = 14751.0
  )
